document.name: MADÁL - specialty coffee
document.shortDescription: Specialty roastery café by Deák — single-origin espresso and filter steps from the metro hub.
document.longDescription:
MADÁL on Madách Imre út roasts in-house and serves precise espresso and filter coffee near Deák Ferenc tér. The compact bar is a favorite for takeaway and quick sit-downs before exploring central Pest. Beans and hours are on madalcoffee.com.

Sources: https://madalcoffee.com/
